subject: Worker 3 bootstrap
description:
Coordinate on: Review current implementation of docs/tli-theme-cycle-analog-retrieval-tickets.md against lib/tli, scripts/tli, supabase/migrations, and docs. Split into specialist tasks: 1) ticket coverage and contract traceability, 2) TDD/test evidence and missing regressions, 3) production control-plane, ship-gate, rollback, and fail-closed behavior, 4) code quality, security, and maintainability. Report only concrete findings with file:line refs, residual risks, and final APPROVE/REQUEST CHANGES verdict.

Report findings/results back to the lead and keep task updates current.
result:
Verdict: REQUEST CHANGES

Findings:
1. Label policy is incomplete. lib/tli/episode-policy.ts:53-60 never emits inferred-v1 starts, and scripts/tli/build-episode-registry.ts:245-250 always calls classifyEpisodeEnd() with notSeenDays=0 and recentScores=[]. PRD-inferred boundaries in docs/tli-theme-cycle-analog-retrieval-enterprise-prd.md:191-220 therefore cannot materialize. scripts/tli/__tests__/build-episode-registry.test.ts:123-147 covers only observed-end cases, so the inferred-end regression is untested.
2. TCAR-008 is not wired into the label pipeline. scripts/tli/build-query-snapshots.ts:119-153 hardcodes inferred/imported rows as ineligible with no audit-pass input. The separate audit-pass helper exists in lib/tli/promotion-eligibility.ts:39-50,77-87, but repo-wide search showed only test references; scripts/tli/build-label-table.ts is also missing.
3. Phase 0 bridge certification is still a stub. scripts/tli/run-phase0-bridge.ts:4-8 says DB integration will be added later, and scripts/tli/run-phase0-bridge.ts:31-36 returns only pending_not_materialized defaults, so TCAR-003A cannot emit real parity/cutover/rollback artifacts.
4. Forecast control/fail-closed serving is not on the production path. scripts/tli/forecast-serving.ts:1-11 is pure helper code and repo-wide search showed test-only usage. app/api/tli/themes/[id]/comparison-v4-reader.ts:145-153 still reads comparison_v4_control instead of forecast_control_v1, app/api/tli/themes/[id]/route.ts:4-7,107-125 still serves the legacy ThemeDetail path, and app/api/tli/themes/[id]/forecast-reader.ts is missing.
5. Analyst-facing forecast payloads are not exposed end-to-end. lib/tli/forecast/api-payloads.ts:1-128 is pure builder code only referenced by tests; app/api/tli/themes/[id]/build-response.ts:77-151 and lib/tli/types/api.ts:112-180 do not add forecast/evidence payloads, while app/themes/[id]/_components/theme-prediction/index.tsx:42-45,147-149,176-179 still renders similarity-based heuristics and copy.
6. TCAR-020 docs/artifacts are incomplete. docs/tli-theme-cycle-analog-retrieval-runbook.md and docs/tli-theme-cycle-analog-retrieval-certification.md are missing, and scripts/tli/certification-pack.ts:111-153 only returns in-memory checklist/memo objects.

Residual risks:
- Boundary leakage / mislabeling remains possible because inferred boundary handling is not operational.
- Bridge/cutover readiness cannot be trusted because certification is not wired to live data.
- Serving remains similarity-first rather than forecast/evidence-first.

Verification:
- PASS typecheck: npx tsc --noEmit
- PASS tests: npm test (112 files, 1095 tests passed)
- FAIL lint: npx eslint lib/tli scripts/tli app/api/tli/themes/[id] app/themes/[id] --ext .ts,.tsx (errors in scripts/tli/backfill-state-history.ts:38, scripts/tli/level4/calibration-artifact.ts:42, scripts/tli/level4/weight-artifact.ts:27)
- PASS targeted integration checks: npx vitest run app/api/tli/themes/[id]/route.test.ts app/api/tli/themes/[id]/fetch-theme-data.test.ts app/api/tli/themes/[id]/fetch-theme-data-v4.test.ts app/api/tli/themes/[id]/comparison-v4-reader.test.ts app/api/tli/themes/[id]/build-comparisons.test.ts app/api/tli/themes/[id]/build-response.test.ts app/themes/[id]/_components/comparison-list/logic.test.ts app/themes/[id]/_components/theme-prediction/presentation.test.ts (36 tests passed)
- FAIL TDD evidence audit: test files claim "TDD RED phase" but no matching theme-cycle / phase0 / retrieval / forecast-ship certification artifacts were found under .omx/scientist/reports.
